title: Quantitative Finance with SAS: Apply, Analyze & Evaluate
description:
This comprehensive course introduces learners to the practical applications of SAS in quantitative finance, combining foundational statistical concepts with advanced market data analysis.

In Module 1, learners explore the SAS environment, conduct descriptive statistics, apply T-Tests, interpret correlation, and build regression and variance models to evaluate financial data.

In Module 2, participants progress to advanced applications by applying SAS procedures to economic datasets, forecasting financial trends, and analyzing real-world financial markets including the BSE Sensex and forex.

By the end of this course, learners will be able to analyze financial datasets, apply SAS procedures to real-world economic and market scenarios, interpret statistical outputs accurately, and evaluate financial risks for data-driven decision-making.
